name: Monday Night Karaoke
description: Kick off your week with a night of fun and laughter! Join us every Monday from 7–10 PM for karaoke at Gelato Joe's. Whether you're belting out classics or trying something new, the stage is yours!
title: Monday Night Karaoke

name: Wednesday Night Karaoke
description: Midweek just got more exciting! Stop by every Wednesday from 7–10 PM and show off your singing skills. Gather your friends for a night filled with music and good times on The Deck.
title: Wednesday Night Karaoke

name: Thursday Night Live Music
description: Relax and enjoy the soothing tunes of live music every Thursday from 7–10 PM. Featuring local artists, this is the perfect way to unwind and soak in the vibrant atmosphere at Gelato Joe's.
title: Thursday Night Live Music

name: Friday Night Live Music
description: Start your weekend with amazing vibes and incredible live performances! Every Friday from 7–10 PM, The Deck comes alive with music and energy. Don't miss the best start to your weekend!
title: Friday Night Live Music

name: Saturday Night Live Music
description: Relax and enjoy live music from "The Heat" every Saturday from 7–10 PM. The Deck comes alive with music and energy for an unforgettable night.
title: Saturday Night Live Music

name: Sunday Live Music
description: Feel the rhythm and groove to the sounds of talented local musicians. Experience live music on Sundays from 4–7 PM to wind down your weekend or kick it up a notch.
title: Sunday Live Music

name: Live Music

title: Live Music

name: Live Music
description: The legendary Flora-Bama is famous for year-long live music on five different stages. Whether you want country, rock, ballads or beach music you can find it at the Flora-Bama. Thousands of musicians perform each year.
title: Live Music

name: Worship on the Water - Flora-Bama Church
description: Worship Service held under the Tent with live music where everyone is welcome to join. A place where it's okay to not be okay. Services last one hour and include amazing live worship and Bible-based teaching. No fancy dress necessary, casual clothing welcome.
title: Worship on the Water - Flora-Bama Church
artist_name: Pastor Ben Ragsdale with live music

name: Good Friday Service
description: Service held in a large tent on the sand behind Flora-Bama facing the beautiful Gulf of Mexico.
title: Good Friday Service

name: Easter Services
description: Services held in a large tent on the sand behind Flora-Bama facing the beautiful Gulf of Mexico.
title: Easter Services

name: Free Bingo
description: Free bingo in the Tent Stage
title: Free Bingo

name: Ladies Night
description: Special night for ladies at the Flora-Bama
title: Ladies Night

name: Membership Night
description: Members get their first drink free (value up to $6)
title: Membership Night

name: Polar Bear Dip
description: After celebrating New Year's Eve at the Flora-Bama there is only one way to start the new year by taking a plunge into the Gulf of America with a few thousand of your friends. This is the 42nd annual event.
title: Polar Bear Dip

name: Super Chili Bowl Cook-Off
description: The Chili Bowl Cook-Off raises funds for the American Cancer Society. Enter your team for a great event or come taste the fantastic recipes. All proceeds go to charity. This is the 32nd annual event.
title: Super Chili Bowl Cook-Off

name: Boozy Bee Spelling Bee
description: Adult spelling bee competition. Get your revenge on grade school by signing up for our Boozy Adult Spelling Bee!
title: Boozy Bee Spelling Bee

name: Flora-Bama Annual Beach Run/Walk
description: Annual Beach Run/Walk for America's Warriors. The start and end point is right here at the Flora-Bama and we run entirely on the beach!
title: Flora-Bama Annual Beach Run/Walk

name: Easter Egg Hunt & Bunny Drop
description: Happy Easter to everybunny! Kids' crafts and face painting in the tent. Festivities will begin at 11AM.
title: Easter Egg Hunt & Bunny Drop

name: Mullet Man Triathlon
description: This is our 26th Annual Mullet Man Triathlon! Part of the Annual Interstate Mullet Toss & Gulf Coast's Greatest Beach Party.
title: Mullet Man Triathlon

name: Mullet Swing Golf Classic
description: The 26th Annual Mullet Swing Golf Classic will be a 4-person scramble. Maximum handicap per player is 30. This event fills up fast so book your team!
title: Mullet Swing Golf Classic

name: Interstate Mullet Toss & Beach Party
description: The Interstate Mullet Toss & Gulf Coast's Greatest Beach Party is legendary. What started as just a reason to party has become one of the biggest beach parties on the coast. This is the 37th annual event.
title: Interstate Mullet Toss & Beach Party

name: Bikini & Hot Body Contest
description: Beach bar bikini contest. Top 3 finalists have a chance to win $5,000 so register now.
title: Bikini & Hot Body Contest

name: The Bushwacker's 51st Birthday Bash
description: Happy birthday to the world famous Flora-Bama Bushwacker! Everyone's favorite cocktail is turning 51 and we're throwing a party to celebrate!
title: The Bushwacker's 51st Birthday Bash

name: Flora-Bama Fishing Rodeo
description: The 'Funnest' Fishing Tournament on the Gulf Coast - the Annual Fishing Rodeo is the 'Every Mans' fishing rodeo! Just like the Flora-Bama, you don't have to be a VIP to fish with us!
title: Flora-Bama Fishing Rodeo

name: Flora-Bama Freedom Run
description: This patriotic run features two courses: The 4-Mile Run/Walk Course or the 1-Mile Fun Run/Walk! Break out your best red, white and blue attire to make this run scream AMERICA!
title: Flora-Bama Freedom Run

name: July 4th Party
description: The 4th of July Party at Flora-Bama is Legendary! Come to the beach and enjoy a Bikini Contest, Live Music, Freedom Run, fireworks with Red-White-Blue fun!
title: July 4th Party

name: Sandstock
description: Flora-Bama's ode to Woodstock - join us for Sandstock! Wear your favorite hippie attire as the Flora-Bama goes back in time! Festivities are all day with live music from the 60's, themed food, and decor.
title: Sandstock

name: Bulls On The Beach
description: Bulls On The Beach is one of Flora-Bama's most anticipated events of the year! Bring the family out to experience the ultimate adrenaline rush with three nights of live rodeo action featuring professional bull riders from across the Southeast. This is the 8th annual event.
title: Bulls On The Beach

name: Oktoberfest
description: Break out your lederhosen for Flora-Bama's Oktoberfest. A great event for beer and food lovers. Earn a free stein and enjoy complimentary German food from the buffet.
title: Oktoberfest

name: Halloween Costume Contest
description: On All Hallow's Eve, the Flora-Bama is THE place to be! Better bring your costume 'A Game' our contenders go over the top to compete for prizes in our annual Halloween Costume contest.
title: Halloween Costume Contest

name: Frank Brown International Songwriters' Festival
description: The Annual Frank Brown International Songwriters' Festival will feature more than 200 nationally acclaimed songwriters. The festival is for songwriters and musicians from all over the world.
title: Frank Brown International Songwriters' Festival

name: Flora-Bama's Thanksgiving Potluck
description: We are so thankful each year for the wonderful guests, fantastic team members and amazing surroundings. The Flora-Bama invites you to eat, drink and be thankful at our tradition. Bring a side dish and friend we have the meats covered.
title: Flora-Bama's Thanksgiving Potluck

name: Santa Drop At Flora-Bama
description: We kick-off the Christmas holidays with our annual Santa Drop here at the World Famous Flora-Bama! See Santa skydive onto our white sandy beaches then jump in line in the Tent for Santa pics!
title: Santa Drop At Flora-Bama

name: Annual Christmas Potluck
description: Whether you have been naughty or nice the Flora-Bama Christmas Potluck is a time for gathering of friends and family. Just bring a side dish and friend we have the meats covered.
title: Annual Christmas Potluck

name: Make It To The Line Run/Walk
description: Run, jog, walk or crawl at the Annual Make It To The Line 4-miler fun run/walk. This is a great family event and proceeds go to the Secret Santa Fund to benefit local families in need.
title: Make It To The Line Run/Walk

name: Flora-Bama's New Year's Eve Bash
description: The Flora-Bama is THE place to be on New Year's Eve! Live music on all three stages will be rockin' until the party stops. Food, party favors, and a midnight champagne toast to good times help bring in the New Year the Flora-Bama way!
title: Flora-Bama's New Year's Eve Bash

title: Live Music & Events

title: Shark Fest

name: Monday Night Steak & Martinis
description: 6oz steak served with truffle mash, green beans & garlic knot. Select Martinis: Deep Eddys Classic Martini, Gimlet, Cosmopolitan, Queen Bee, or Evan Williams Manhattan
title: Monday Night Steak & Martinis

name: Tuesday Night Specials
description: Orange Beach: Lemon Caper Chicken Pasta. Foley: Fried Mullet with hushpuppies
title: Tuesday Night Specials

name: Wednesday Night Prime Rib & Margaritas
description: Orange Beach: Prime Rib served with a baked potato and garlic knot. Foley: Prime Rib Pasta with peppers, onions & signature Hog Rub seasoning
title: Wednesday Night Prime Rib & Margaritas

name: Thursday Night Specials
description: Orange Beach: Beer Batter Fish-N-Chips. Foley: The Southern Plate with fried chicken, collard greens, mac & cheese, and cornbread
title: Thursday Night Specials

name: Friday Night Seafood Specials
description: Orange Beach: Grouper Pontchartrain served over rice pilaf. Foley: Bourbon Glazed Salmon over Greek lemon rice with sautéed veggies
title: Friday Night Seafood Specials

name: Saturday Surf & Turf & Bushwackers
description: NY Strip (8oz) & 3 fried gulf shrimp with choice of a baked potato & a garlic knot
title: Saturday Surf & Turf & Bushwackers

name: Sunday Prime Rib & Brunch Cocktails
description: Foley: Prime Rib served with your choice of baked potato or baked sweet potato & garlic knot. Orange Beach: Prime Rib Pasta with peppers, onions & signature Hog Rub seasoning
title: Sunday Prime Rib & Brunch Cocktails
